title: angelonia micrantha
intro: Angelonia micrantha, also known as the Mexican angel, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Angelonia micrantha include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and crushing the leaves or flowers to make teas, infusions, or topical creams for therapeutic use.
